name: Account Manipulation via SSH Key Addition
description: Detects modification of SSH authorized_keys files for persistence
query:
// Detect SSH key addition to authorized_keys
// Trigger on file writes to .ssh/authorized_keys
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)\.ssh[/\\]authorized_keys"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
